autoscaling_queue_risk.note: instance-level scheduler-delay proxy; not measured serving autoscaling

verdict.label_compatibility: SwissAI reuse_percentage = MEASURED bucket overlap; Mooncake cache_reuse_pct = DERIVED global-prefix-cache proxy. Same DEFINITION (reused_blocks/total_blocks) but different PROVENANCE; only a harmonized high_reuse proxy is cross-comparable.
verdict.mooncake_only_caveat: Mooncake's high within-dataset gain is partly an ARTIFACT: the derived reuse proxy is autocorrelated and the decision-time rolling reuse-mean feature predicts it strongly; the per-trace baseline is near-degenerate (AUROC~0.5). Not evidence of measured alpha.
verdict.reason: SwissAI-only (MEASURED label) beats its strong per-model baseline by 6.31%, but cross-dataset transfer does NOT beat the target's own baseline in both directions (mooncake->swissai AUROC 0.6071680399815405 vs swissai baseline 0.7149553272308133). No second MEASURED source validates it -> remains single-dataset.

transfer_vs_degenerate_cross_baseline.caveat: cross-dataset per-group baseline degrades to ~0.5 (source groups absent in target), so these % are INFLATED; use transfer_vs_target_own_baseline instead.

cold_start_cost.note: calibration-only FaaS prior; GPU cold-start ML remains blocked_by_missing_labels
